promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch in folder order after the archived behavioral-boot reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the thin canon inventory, scoped drift repair, consequence expansion, and snapshot-versus-law tensions that compress cleanly into smaller reusable packets.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Episode 01 was used to keep the low-entropy library tied to thicker archived process history and canon-gap cautions rather than over-authorizing the summary surface in isolation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this adjacent low-entropy library batch was reduced into a smaller archived canon-boundary packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived low-entropy-library parent batch plus the Episode 01 archived-state anchor were sufficient to isolate the reusable canon-boundary, scope-repair, consequence-classification, and snapshot-separation packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_LOW_ENTROPY_SUMMARY_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the source as archived low-entropy summary material without letting its canon-grounding language self-authorize it.

candidate_items.name: THIN_CANON_INVENTORY_AND_SCOPE_BOUNDARY_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest directly grounded canon inventory and boundary clarification packet.

candidate_items.name: APPEND_ONLY_SCOPE_CORRECTION_WITHOUT_REWRITE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest self-repair pattern in the library without promoting the lagging version header.

candidate_items.name: POST_CANON_CONSEQUENCE_LAYER_CLASSIFICATION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the consequence claims by classifying them as archived proposal-side compression rather than collapsing them into thin-canon facts.

candidate_items.name: STATE_SNAPSHOT_VS_STRUCTURAL_LAW_SEPARATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest separation between time-bounded clean-state markers and durable structural claims.

candidate_items.name: LOW_ENTROPY_REQUIRES_THICKER_REASONING_CONTEXT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest defense against low-entropy overreach by tying the summary surface back to thicker archived reasoning history.

quarantined_items.name: HEADER_V1_BODY_V4_VERSION_MISMATCH_AS_CURRENT_INTERFACE_SIGNAL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The lagging header is archival residue, not a recommended present interface contract.

quarantined_items.name: SYSTEM_WIDE_NONCOMMUTATION_WITHOUT_THREAD_B_SCOPE_CAVEAT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The later Thread-B scope repair must remain attached to the earlier wording instead of being flattened away.

quarantined_items.name: POST_CANON_COMPOSITION_EQUIVALENCE_UPDATE_CLAIMS_AS_THIN_CANON_FACTS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The later consequence claims are interpretive compression layered on the thinner inventory, not inventory-level facts by themselves.

quarantined_items.name: CANON_CLEAN_SNAPSHOT_ENTRIES_AS_TIMELESS_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The clean-state markers are explicitly time-bounded snapshot facts rather than timeless ontology.

quarantined_items.name: LOW_ENTROPY_COMPRESSION_AS_SUFFICIENT_REASONING_SUBSTRATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The library is a compression artifact and cannot substitute for the thicker archived reasoning path it summarizes.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest archived canon-boundary, scope-repair, consequence-classification, and snapshot-separation packets from the parent batch.
They preserve the low-entropy library as useful summary-layer history without letting compactness or canon-grounding language self-authorize the batch.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain interface residue, over-broad scope readings, time-bounded snapshot overreads, or summary-over-support collapses rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used Episode 01 as the thick-history anchor so the low-entropy library would not be over-trusted in isolation.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived low-entropy-library reduction pass.
